build.buildCommand: npm install -g pnpm@10.28.1 && pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --prod=false && pnpm --filter @workspace/caremetric-train run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/caremetric-train run build

deploy.startCommand: npm install -g pnpm@10.28.1 && pnpm --filter @workspace/caremetric-train run start
